policy: Zapier MCP focuses on War Room orchestration only. No overlap with Comet or GHL customer comms.

primary_slack_channel.name: #war-room
primary_slack_channel.purpose: MONSTER SALES HYPE — ALL agent Slack posts go here ONLY. No DMs. No sold-clients. Minimum 5 posts per run.

sold_clients.name: #sold-clients
sold_clients.note: Humans only — agents post closes in #war-room with trophy emoji

zapier_forbidden_actions.ghl_customer_campaign_enrollment: Customer stage triggers handle workflows — NEVER call campaign for prospects/clients
zapier_forbidden_actions.customer_sms_email: GHL workflows own all prospect/client comms
zapier_forbidden_actions.lead_generation: Cursor deal-hunter owns B2B lead gen
zapier_forbidden_actions.ringcentral_sms: GHL owns SMS — RingCentral texting not enabled
zapier_forbidden_actions.duplicate_stage_advance: Skip if cursor_stage_set tag matches target stage
